features: ENERGISING SHOWER GEL: This Bergamot & Sea Salt Imperial Leather body washl has a luxurious creamy lather, leaving skin soft & clean
LUXURY FRAGRANCE: Our shower gel is bursting with a Bergamot & Sea Salt fragrance with fresh fruit notes & a woody base
RICH LATHER: Imperial Leather Shower Gel transforms into clouds of rich, creamy lather for a decadent experience - leaving you energised & powerful
SKIN CARE: Our shower gel is dermatologically tested & suitable for all skin types - gentle body wash made for self care
BULK BUY: This pack of 6 x bottles of shower gel is a great bulk buy for the whole family.
description: Product Description Set your alarm earlier, this lather is worth it. Energise the everyday and upgrade your daily shower routine with Imperial Leather's Bergamot & Sea Salt indulgent body wash. Wrap yourself in super creamy lather enriched with our signature oil blend for a touch of extravagance and timeless quality, bursting with strength, power and heritage… this fragrance is sensual, audacious and contemporary. A combination of tantalising fruity top notes, a fresh and fruity heart, rounded off with a woody base of oakmoss, cedarwood and ambergris. It's far too luxurious for a quick shower... Sorry! Ingredients Aqua/Water, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum/Fragrance, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Lactic Acid, PEG-200 Hydrogenated Glyceryl Palmate, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Polyquaternium-7, PEG-6 Caprylic/Capric Glycerides, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Sodium Chloride, Limonene, Linalool, CI 42090/Blue 1, CI 17200/Red 33. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. See more
